threats.title: SQL Injection via Untrusted Input
threats.description: Attackers inject malicious SQL code into input fields (e.g., login forms, search boxes) to manipulate database queries, potentially gaining unauthorized access to sensitive data or modifying system functionality.
threats.attack_vector: Unvalidated user input directly used in SQL queries. Lack of proper input sanitization or parameterized queries.
mitigations: Implement parameterized queries or prepared statements to prevent SQL injection.
Input validation and sanitization to filter out malicious characters and patterns.
Least privilege principle – restrict database user permissions to the minimum required.

threats.title: Credential Stuffing via Weak Authentication
threats.description: Attackers leverage lists of compromised usernames and passwords (credential stuffing) to gain unauthorized access to the system. Due to the lack of information on authentication mechanisms, the system is vulnerable to this common attack.
threats.attack_vector: Brute-force or dictionary attacks against username/password combinations. Exploitation of known vulnerabilities in the authentication logic.
mitigations: Implement Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for all users.
Enforce strong password policies (length, complexity, rotation).
Rate limiting and account lockout policies to mitigate brute-force attacks.

threats.title: Privilege Escalation via Vulnerable Code
threats.description: Attackers exploit vulnerabilities in the system's code to gain elevated privileges, allowing them to perform actions that they are not authorized to perform.
threats.attack_vector: Unvalidated user input, insecure coding practices, or vulnerabilities in third-party libraries.
mitigations: Implement robust access control mechanisms.
Regular code reviews and security testing.
Principle of least privilege – grant users only the minimum necessary permissions.

threats.title: Exposure of Sensitive Data due to Lack of Data Classification
threats.description: Without a defined data classification scheme, the system may inadvertently expose sensitive information to unauthorized users or systems. This includes Personally Identifiable Information (PII), financial data, or intellectual property.
threats.attack_vector: Misconfigured access controls, inadequate encryption, or unintentional data leakage through logging or monitoring.
mitigations: Implement a comprehensive data classification scheme based on sensitivity.
Apply appropriate data loss prevention (DLP) controls.
Regularly audit access controls and data security policies.

threats.title: Resource Exhaustion via Malicious Input
threats.description: Attackers send a flood of requests or malicious data to the system, overwhelming its resources and causing a denial of service.
threats.attack_vector: Malformed requests, oversized data payloads, or exploitation of vulnerabilities leading to excessive resource consumption.
mitigations: Implement rate limiting and traffic shaping.
Input validation and sanitization to prevent malicious data from being processed.
Web Application Firewall (WAF) to filter out malicious requests.

gaps: Potential gaps in data classification enforcement

dfd_mermaid:
flowchart TB

    %% Styling
    classDef external fill:#e1f5fe,stroke:#0277bd,stroke-width:2px
    classDef process fill:#e8f5e9,stroke:#2e7d32,stroke-width:2px
    classDef datastore fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#ef6c00,stroke-width:2px
    classDef threat fill:#ffebee,stroke:#c62828,stroke-width:3px

    subgraph External["External Entities"]
        user[("👤 User")]
        admin[("👔 Admin")]
        external_api[("🌐 External API")]
    end

    subgraph TrustBoundary["Trust Boundary"]
        subgraph Frontend["Frontend Layer"]
            web_app["🖥️ Web Application"]
        end

        subgraph Backend["Backend Layer"]
            api_gateway["🚪 API Gateway"]
            auth_service["🔐 Auth Service"]
            core_api["⚙️ Core API"]
        end

        subgraph Data["Data Layer"]
            database[("💾 Database")]
            cache[("⚡ Cache")]
        end
    end

    %% Data Flows
    user -->|"🔒 HTTPS"| web_app
    admin -->|"🔒 HTTPS + MFA"| web_app
    web_app -->|"🔒 API Calls"| api_gateway
    api_gateway -->|"🔒 Auth Check"| auth_service
    api_gateway -->|"🔒 Business Logic"| core_api
    auth_service -->|"🔒 User Data"| database
    core_api -->|"🔒 CRUD"| database
    core_api -->|"⚠️ Session"| cache
    core_api -->|"🔒 External Call"| external_api

    %% Apply Styles
    class user,admin,external_api external
    class web_app,api_gateway,auth_service,core_api process
    class database,cache datastore
    class web_app,auth_service,database threat

semgrep.config_file:
rules:
- fix: cursor.execute($QUERY, (params,))
  id: security-custom-1
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: SQL Injection via Untrusted Input
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-89
    owasp: A03:2021
    threat_category: Tampering
  patterns:
  - pattern: cursor.execute($QUERY)
    pattern-not: cursor.execute($QUERY, $PARAMS)
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-2
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Credential Stuffing via Weak Authentication
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-287
    owasp: A07:2021
    threat_category: Spoofing
  patterns:
  - pattern: password = "..."
  - pattern: secret = "..."
  - pattern: api_key = "..."
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-3
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Privilege Escalation via Vulnerable Code
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-269
    owasp: A01:2021
    threat_category: Elevation of Privilege
  patterns:
  - pattern: eval($X)
  - pattern: exec($X)
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-4
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Exposure of Sensitive Data due to Lack of Data Classification
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-200
    owasp: A01:2021
    threat_category: Information Disclosure
  patterns:
  - pattern: print($SENSITIVE)
  - pattern: console.log($SENSITIVE)
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-5
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Resource Exhaustion via Malicious Input
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-400
    owasp: A05:2021
    threat_category: Denial of Service
  patterns:
  - pattern: eval($X)
  - pattern: exec($X)
  severity: ERROR
